primary_reason: This narrative review summarizes global syphilis trends, disparities, and surveillance gaps without developing or evaluating a reusable surveillance or analytic method.
This study develops and cross-validates an imputation, evolutionary-sampling, optimization, and random-forest framework for dengue outbreak prediction.
This study uses pre-post surveillance comparisons and age stratification to assess vaccine impact, indirect protection, and serotype replacement.
This study compares registry and survey measurements to quantify misclassification of HIV transmission modes caused by stigmatized underreporting.
